This family is part of the larger order Asparagales, which includes many types of flowering plants. The order Asparagales is within the class Liliopsida, which is a group of monocots. The class Liliopsida is a subset of the larger division Magnoliophyta, which includes all flowering plants. Overall, Aleuritia frondosa's classification reflects its evolutionary relationship with other flowering plants.
